special_mechanics.name: Steel Cage Match
special_mechanics.description: First WWF console-based game to feature a steel cage match variant. Gameplay mechanics identical to standard matches.

special_mechanics.name: Running Attacks
special_mechanics.description: Flying clothesline, dropkick attacks available while moving

special_mechanics.name: Grapple System
special_mechanics.description: Body slam, throw, and headbutt grapple moves available

special_mechanics.name: Ground Attacks
special_mechanics.description: Stomp and elbow drop ground-based attacks

special_mechanics.name: Turnbuckle Moves
special_mechanics.description: Special move available when opponent near turnbuckle

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Qualitative only. Wikipedia source provides only gameplay mode and moveset descriptions with no numerical physics parameters. No jump mechanics, gravity values, acceleration, or sub-pixel system data documented for this wrestling game.
sources_used: Wikipedia - WWF WrestleMania: Steel Cage Challenge
